title: Verifying adding a minimum maximum price filter in USD
reason: Applied USD price filter (min 50, max 150) on the Bangkok results; URL reflected PriceFrom=50&PriceTo=150 and all displayed hotel prices fell within the 50-150 USD range.

reason: Search for the popular destination Bangkok loaded the results page with 12 hotel cards displayed, exceeding the minimum of 10.
